name: Fruit Salad with Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Scoop out melon with a melon baller.
2. Cut peel from oranges and remove white membrane. Slice crosswise.
3. Remove seeds from grapes and cut in half.
4. Line a glass bowl with lettuce leaves.
5. Arrange melon balls, orange slices, grapes, and walnut halves on top of the lettuce in layers.
6. Mix all dressing ingredients well.
7. Adjust seasonings as desired.
8. Pour dressing over fruit.
9. Let salad marinate for 30 minutes.
10. Toss salad just before serving.
